positive: A maximalist, symmetrical composition featuring stylized, deep-sea flora and fauna. The main subject is a complex arrangement of bioluminescent coral structures and graceful oceanic jellyfish forms. The style is hyper-detailed neo-Art Nouveau mixed with futuristic botanical illustration, rendered in solid, distinct silhouettes against a muted, deep indigo background. Use vibrant pops of electric cyan, neon magenta, and emerald green for the bioluminescence, ensuring high contrast and graphic separation. The composition must be centered, suitable for repeat patterns or single, high-impact placement on fabric, emphasizing clean lines and elegant curves. Highly detailed, vector-art precision, crisp edges, rule of thirds applied to the negative space for breathing room.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermarks, low quality, noisy, jpeg artifacts, bad anatomy, cropped, extra limbs, signature, watermark, logo, copyright, bokeh, blurry, soft edges
